creator: hohmuth@inf.tu-dresden.de
text:
When using the PCVT console driver, in visual UserConfig, the cursor
keys don't work.

The other keys (Tab, "q" etc.) still work OK.

Fix: 

Use the dumb console UserConfig, or don't use the PCVT console driver
How-To-Repeat: Configure a kernel to use the PCVT console driver.

Boot the kernel with "-c".

Type "visual".

Try using the arrow keys.
